LineComment.Text: Title: Management of the general MCP button functionalities
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Activation de la correction de l'avance
Forcing the override at 100% between 20% and 120% in manual/MDA mode WFA A REVOIR
Allows modifying the movement speed OF the axis using the feed potentiometer
Allows adjustment of the axis movement speed using the feed potentiometer
